metadata.name: escrow_confidential
metadata.description: Confidential escrow with Encrypt (FHE) and Ika (dWallet) CPI integration

instructions.name: approve_cross_chain
docs: Instruction 4: Approve a cross-chain message for signing via dWallet.
When a deal completes, the middleman program can authorize the Ika network
to sign a cross-chain settlement proof. This creates a MessageApproval PDA
on the dWallet program, which the Ika validators detect and sign via 2PC-MPC.

instructions.name: cancel_deal
docs: Instruction 5: Cancel a deal before both parties have deposited.
Only the creator (middleman) can cancel. Refunds any existing deposit.

instructions.name: create_confidential_deal
docs: Instruction 0: Create a confidential deal with encrypted collateral references.
The caller provides ciphertext account pubkeys (created off-chain via gRPC
createInput) and a pre-created result ciphertext account. The instruction
stores references and CPIs into Encrypt to execute the settlement validation
graph under FHE.

accounts.name: middleman
docs: Middleman agent (must sign)

instructions.name: deposit_encrypted
docs: Instruction 1: Record a deposit against a confidential deal.
Buyer or seller deposits SOL into the deal PDA. The deposit amount is
validated against the on-chain deal state (not the encrypted amount — that
is verified during settlement via FHE).

instructions.name: deposit_sol_for_credit
docs: Deposit native SOL into the program-controlled vault and mint internal
1:1 credit in the caller's CreditBalance account.

instructions.name: emergency_refund_after_timeout
docs: Recover a locked credit leg after a timeout without middleman cooperation.

instructions.name: execute_withdrawal_batch
docs: Execute one queued withdrawal. Multiple calls with different withdrawal
accounts form a batch while keeping each record replay-safe.

instructions.name: initialize_credit_vault
docs: Initialize the vault-backed internal PER credit ledger.

instructions.name: lock_credit_for_deal
docs: Lock internal shielded credit against one funding leg of a PER deal.

instructions.name: queue_withdrawal
docs: Queue a delayed withdrawal from internal credit to a fresh public wallet.

instructions.name: request_settlement_decryption
docs: Instruction 2: Request decryption of the settlement result.
After the Encrypt executor has computed the FHE settlement graph and
written the result to settlement_result_ct, anyone can request decryption.
The digest is stored in the deal for later verification (store-and-verify).

accounts.name: request_account
docs: Fresh decryption request account keypair. Must sign because Encrypt creates it.

instructions.name: reveal_and_release
docs: Instruction 3: Reveal the decrypted settlement result and release funds.
Implements the store-and-verify pattern:
1. Read the decrypted value from the decryption request account
2. Verify the digest matches what was stored during request_settlement_decryption
3. If valid, release funds to the appropriate party
This prevents stale-value and race-condition attacks — if the ciphertext
was modified between request and reveal, the digest won't match.

instructions.name: settle_locked_credit
docs: Release locked internal credit after the FHE/IKA approval path has
decided whether the seller or buyer receives the payment leg.

errors.name: InvalidDealStatus
errors.msg: Invalid deal status for this operation

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the expected party

errors.name: DigestMismatch
errors.msg: Decryption digest does not match stored value — possible stale-value attack

errors.name: DealExpired
errors.msg: Deal has exceeded maximum lifetime

errors.name: InvalidProgramId
errors.msg: Invalid external program ID

errors.name: CiphertextMismatch
errors.msg: Ciphertext account mismatch

errors.name: DecryptionPending
errors.msg: Decryption not yet complete

errors.name: AmountOverflow
errors.msg: Lamport amount overflow

errors.name: ApprovalPending
errors.msg: dWallet approval is not yet signed on-chain

errors.name: InvalidMessageApproval
errors.msg: Invalid MessageApproval account for this deal

errors.name: InvalidEncryptAccount
errors.msg: Invalid Encrypt account or PDA wiring

errors.name: InvalidCallerProgram
errors.msg: Caller program account is invalid or not executable

errors.name: InvalidCiphertextAccount
errors.msg: Ciphertext account is invalid or missing digest data

errors.name: InvalidSettlementTarget
errors.msg: Settlement target is invalid for this deal

errors.name: InvalidApprovalNonce
errors.msg: Approval nonce must strictly increase

errors.name: ApprovalExpired
errors.msg: Approval expired before it could be recorded

errors.name: InvalidApprovalAction
errors.msg: Release payload action did not match the invoked instruction

errors.name: InvalidApprovalRole
errors.msg: Release payload role does not match the approver wallet

errors.name: InvalidApprovalSignature
errors.msg: Release payload failed Ed25519 verification

errors.name: InvalidReleaseApprovalAccount
errors.msg: Release approval PDA is not valid for this deal

errors.name: DisputeOpen
errors.msg: A release dispute is already open

errors.name: DisputeNotOpen
errors.msg: No dispute is open for this deal

errors.name: DisputeWindowClosed
errors.msg: The release dispute window is not open

errors.name: ReleaseAlreadyAuthorized
errors.msg: Release already authorized for IKA signing

errors.name: ReleaseAlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: Release has already executed

errors.name: ReleaseNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Release is not yet authorized

errors.name: SettlementPlanNotApproved
errors.msg: Both buyer and seller must approve the settlement plan first

errors.name: BuyerReleaseConfirmationMissing
errors.msg: Buyer has not yet confirmed the final release

errors.name: SellerDisputeWindowActive
errors.msg: The seller dispute window is still active

errors.name: InvalidDepositType
errors.msg: The deposit type is not valid for this funding model

errors.name: DuplicateDepositType
errors.msg: This deposit leg has already been recorded

errors.name: InvalidFundingCommitment
errors.msg: The provided deposit amount does not match the committed funding hash

errors.name: FundingRailMismatch
errors.msg: Funding rail does not match this deal

errors.name: CreditVaultPaused
errors.msg: The credit vault is paused

errors.name: InvalidCreditVault
errors.msg: Invalid credit vault account

errors.name: InvalidCreditAmount
errors.msg: Credit amount must be positive

errors.name: InsufficientCredit
errors.msg: Insufficient internal credit

errors.name: InsufficientEscrowFunds
errors.msg: Escrow account cannot cover payout while preserving rent

errors.name: CreditReserveInvariantFailed
errors.msg: Vault reserve invariant failed

errors.name: WithdrawalAlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: Withdrawal has already been executed

errors.name: WithdrawalNotReady
errors.msg: Withdrawal delay has not elapsed

errors.name: TimeoutNotReached
errors.msg: Timeout has not been reached

fields.name: deal_id
docs: Unique deal identifier (32 bytes)

fields.name: buyer_identity_commitment
docs: Buyer identity commitment (hash of the participant wallet)

fields.name: seller_identity_commitment
docs: Seller identity commitment (hash of the participant wallet)

fields.name: middleman
docs: Middleman agent pubkey

fields.name: session_pda
docs: PER session PDA used to bind private funding commitments

fields.name: buyer_collateral_ct
docs: Buyer collateral ciphertext account pubkey (Encrypt)

fields.name: seller_collateral_ct
docs: Seller collateral ciphertext account pubkey (Encrypt)

fields.name: payment_amount_ct
docs: Payment amount ciphertext account pubkey (Encrypt)

fields.name: settlement_result_ct
docs: Settlement result ciphertext account pubkey (Encrypt, written by executor)

fields.name: dwallet
docs: dWallet account for cross-chain signing (Ika)

fields.name: buyer_payment_funding_hash
docs: Funding commitment hash for the buyer's payment leg

fields.name: buyer_collateral_funding_hash
docs: Funding commitment hash for the buyer's collateral leg

fields.name: seller_collateral_funding_hash
docs: Funding commitment hash for the seller's collateral leg

fields.name: private_funding_registered
docs: True once the private funding commitments are registered

fields.name: buyer_payment_deposited
docs: Buyer payment deposit status

fields.name: buyer_collateral_deposited
docs: Buyer collateral deposit status

fields.name: seller_collateral_deposited
docs: Seller collateral deposit status

fields.name: terms_hash
docs: Terms hash bound to release approvals

fields.name: plan_hash
docs: Settlement plan hash bound to release approvals

fields.name: settlement_policy
docs: Settlement policy bound to the committed release plan

fields.name: funding_privacy_tier
docs: PER funding rail used for this deal.

fields.name: buyer_release_nonce
docs: Latest buyer approval nonce

fields.name: seller_release_nonce
docs: Latest seller approval nonce

fields.name: buyer_plan_approved
docs: True once buyer approves the settlement plan

fields.name: seller_plan_approved
docs: True once seller approves the settlement plan

fields.name: buyer_release_confirmed
docs: Buyer has explicitly requested final release after settlement verification

fields.name: release_requested_at
docs: Timestamp when buyer requested final release

fields.name: seller_dispute_deadline_at
docs: Seller can dispute until this unix timestamp

fields.name: seller_dispute_window_seconds
docs: Configured dispute window length in seconds

fields.name: dispute_open
docs: Hard block while dispute is unresolved

fields.name: release_authorized
docs: True once both approvals are locked and IKA signing begins

fields.name: release_executed
docs: True once payout has executed

fields.name: pending_digest
docs: Decryption digest for store-and-verify pattern

fields.name: status
docs: Deal status enum

fields.name: bet_lamports
docs: Bet amount per side in lamports

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp of deal creation

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed
